import paramiko
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)

    ssh.connect\('192.168.1.20', username='HwHiAiUser', password='Mind@123', timeout=10\)
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('echo SSH_OK && uname -a && cat /etc/os-release | head -3'\)
    print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

    ssh.close\(\)
except Exception as e:

" 2>&1)

import paramiko
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('192.168.137.100', username='HwHiAiUser', password='Mind@123', timeout=10\)

cmds = [
    'python3 --version 2>&1',
    'python3 -c \\"import mindspore; print\(mindspore.__version__\)\\" 2>&1',
    'python3 -c \\"import onnxruntime; print\(onnxruntime.__version__\)\\" 2>&1',
    'ls /usr/local/Ascend/ 2>&1 | head -5',
    'npu-smi info 2>&1 | head -20',
    'ls ~/pig_tracking/ 2>&1',
    'df -h / 2>&1 | tail -1',
    'free -h 2>&1 | head -2',
]
for cmd in cmds:
    print\(f'=== {cmd} ==='\)
    stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(cmd\)
    print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\).strip\(\)\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\(\).strip\(\)
    if err: print\(f'ERR: {err}'\)
    print\(\)

ssh.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/Users/Skyha/.conda/envs/pig_count/python.exe" -c "
import paramiko, os, time

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('192.168.137.100', username='HwHiAiUser', password='Mind@123', timeout=10\)
sftp = ssh.open_sftp\(\)

vdir = r'E:\\Jin的U盘资料\\YOLO\\片段'
remote_vdir = '/home/HwHiAiUser/pig_counting/videos'
files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(vdir\) if f.endswith\('.mp4'\)]\)

start = time.time\(\)
for i, f in enumerate\(files, 1\):
    local = os.path.join\(vdir, f\)
    remote = f'{remote_vdir}/{f}'
    sz = os.path.getsize\(local\) / 1024 / 1024
    sftp.put\(local, remote\)
    elapsed = time.time\(\) - start
    speed = sz / \(elapsed / i\) if elapsed > 0 else 0
    eta = \(len\(files\) - i\) * \(elapsed / i\)
    print\(f'[{i}/{len\(files\)}] {f} \({sz:.1f}MB\) | ETA: {eta:.0f}s'\)

elapsed = time.time\(\) - start
print\(f'\\\\nDone! {len\(files\)} videos in {elapsed:.0f}s \({915/elapsed:.1f} MB/s\)'\)
sftp.close\(\)
ssh.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
